---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement for an existing experiment
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Experiment

Which experiment? (e.g. `website-metadata-extractor`, `is-it-down`)

## Problem or use case

What problem would this solve, or what use case would it enable?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature or improvement you’d like (e.g. new query param, new endpoint, new response field).

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, examples, or other context.
